strengths: All P1 security and correctness issues are correctly identified with precise line-level evidence and exploit-confirmed impact
weaknesses: One P2 finding (F-019) duplicates F-005/F-010 on mutable default args without justification for separate severity; minor severity inflation in treating same anti-pattern as both P1 and P2
recommendations: Consolidate all mutable default argument findings into a single P1 with unified evidence chain to eliminate redundancy and severity inconsistency
